name: SLOT_QKGain4_XSA11
author: Anthony Maio
blurb: SLOT per-sample delta + logit bias (scored-position masked, cosine LR 0.008->0.0008, 16 AdamW steps), QK-Gain 4.0, XSA all 11 layers, on VRL + LeakyReLU2 + BigramHash(1024) + EMA/SWA + int6+lzma base. Eval: sliding-window stride=64 + SLOT (~284s).
